feature.name: CommonMark block/inline parsing and HTML rendering
feature.description: Extract markdown-it-py's MarkdownIt parser and renderer for CommonMark-compatible HTML output.
included_behaviors: render headings, paragraphs, emphasis, lists, blockquotes, links, images, code spans, and fenced code blocks
escape raw text correctly in rendered HTML
parse Markdown into Token objects with nesting, tags, attrs, content, and markup
support the commonmark preset and enable/disable rules
excluded_behaviors: plugin ecosystem beyond core parser rules

entanglement.description: CommonMark rendering is coupled to block/inline parser rules, token trees, renderer state, and escaping behavior.
